findings: pipeline.py exists with all 8 required components: SelectionConfig, _compute_weighted_score, filter_signals, rank_signals, select_top, WeightedRankingModel, ConfiguredSelector, SelectionPipeline.
SelectionConfig is @dataclass(slots=True) with all 5 required fields correctly typed.
filter_signals correctly drops score < min_score AND drops by whitelist when non-empty.
rank_signals performs stable descending sort using _compute_weighted_score.
select_top applies score_cutoff, slices top_n, assigns 1-based rank, equal weight (1/len), sets reason=s.signal.
WeightedRankingModel.score() conforms to RankingModel protocol; ConfiguredSelector.select() conforms to Selector protocol.
selection/__init__.py exports all 4 required symbols with __all__ defined.
17 contract tests all PASSED. 2 scaffold imports tests PASSED.
Anti-spillover verified: no BacktestEngine, OrderIntent, ReportArtifact, SignalGenerator, or BatchRunner present.
No exit-rule logic, backtest internals, or reporting found in any T12 file.
summary: All 13 acceptance criteria satisfied. Static inspection and runtime evidence confirm correct three-stage pipeline implementation.
next_action: Return validation result to Manager for final decision.
